emails.subject: Enron Credit Inc.
emails.body: Enron Credit Inc. Sara, I completed review of the Bear Stearns agreement and re-reviewed the others on Friday. I will find you in the late afternoon to discuss after I get out of a meeting this afternoon. Friday was a marathon day for brokerage agreements we stopped the clock on almost everything to completed JP Morgan almost from start to finish before their lawyer went on a two week vacation. I hope you enjoyed Florida and the wedding! Cheryl Nelson Senior Counsel EB3880D (713) 345-4693

emails.subject: Enron Credit Inc.
emails.body: Enron Credit Inc. Hello Sara, I received your voice message and called you back but you are not available. My understanding of where we stand is not consistent with yours. Here is my understanding: Guaranty: Yes, I got the guaranty executed and have it in my possession. Assignment Agreement: No, we do not have a final draft. As I mentioned on Friday, the last version that Anna sent did not have all of the all of the edits/changes I had recommended to her implemented. In particular, the arbitration language had not been changed and there were some grammatical edits. I refaxed my comments today; Anna agreed to implement them and I am awaiting her draft. (Anna may not have gotten some faxes on Thursday or Friday because her fax number changed when she changed building locations last week). Account Agreement: Yes, you are correct that Anna has to send back a revised draft. She and I have been clling each other every hour. Anna said that she would get back to me in two hours or so after her meeting on another matter. Authorized Traders List: Stephanie had originally taken on this task and sent me an email indicating that the list was complete. Last week, Stephanie indicated that the information upon which she relied was no longer in the database. Therefore, there is some confusion as to who the corporate officers are. I called Richard Sage, with whom Stephanie has been in contact, for assistance. He has not called me back so if you had further suggestions on how to proceeed, please let me know. Account Tax Forms: I have the requisite form the same one I have used for the same tasks for other new Enron entities in my possession and am in the process of filling them out. Logistics: You indicated in your voice message that you were not sure whether I had thought logistically about getting the agreement executed. Let me reassure you that I have. In light of the above, I did not maintain the view that all the documents would be ready for signature by noon particularly because (1) we do not have in our possession final versions of two of the three agreements and (2) I determined on Friday that the Authorized Officers List might now be outdated. I received some emails today disclosing how to proceed re: sending the document. However, as I confirmed with you on Friday, I spoke with Mike Bruegel on Thursday and confirmed where to send the documents. When you are available, please let me know so we can update and resolution on how to proceed on any outstanding matters. Cheryl Nelson Senior Counsel EB3816 (713) 345-4693

emails.subject: Enron Credit Inc.
emails.body: Enron Credit Inc. Sara, I have stopped by your office but you are not around. Please provide the following information/clarification in light of your conversations with other folks: 1. We do not have to send Bear the Officers/Traders list and other documents with the agreements to get things moving? 2. If we do, then who do I contact or ask Richard Sage to contact to get this information re: the correct slate of officers updated? No one has advised me of these steps. And actually, if we have to do this, I would like Stephanie to take the lead on finishing her work on this part of the project. 3. Re: this attorney Cheryl at Bear that you have talked to what is her full name, phone, and fax? Thanx. Cheryl Nelson Senior Counsel EB3816 (713) 345-4693

emails.subject: Re: Enron Credit Inc.
emails.body: Re: Enron Credit Inc. Cheryl: 1. 3. You should verify wtih Cheryl Lewis whose information is in Lotus Notes. I do not have correct spelling of name or her fax number. 2. Officers need to be confirmed through the Enron Corp. corporate secretary's office. See the separate email I just sent you. Sara Shackleton Enron North America Corp. 1400 Smith Street, EB 3801a Houston, Texas 77002 713-853-5620 (phone) 713-646-3490 (fax) sara.shackleton@enron.com Cheryl Nelson@ENRON Sent by: Cheryl Nelson@ENRON 04/02/2001 04:45 PM
